# Enrollment Role Assignments (Data Source)

Data source for reading a Foundry Enrollment Role Assignments.

```terraform
data "foundry_enrollment_role_assignments" "example" {
  enrollment_rid = "ri.foundry.main.enrollment.example-enrollment-rid"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enrollment_rid` (String) RID of the Enrollment. (Required for data source lookup.)

### Read-Only

- `enrollment_role_assignments` (Set of Object) List of Role Assignments for this Enrollment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--enrollment_role_assignments))

<a id="nestedatt--enrollment_role_assignments"></a>
### Nested Schema for `enrollment_role_assignments`

Read-Only:

- `principal_id` (String)
- `role_id` (String)
